MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Dec-15-2016 Set For Trial On Jun-26-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Amend Complaint
Off Calendar May-11-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
Plaintiff Keith Kawamura's motion to amend complaint is granted. Mr. Kawamura is granted leave to file his proposed first amended complaint no later than May 19, 2017. The motion is granted based on California's liberal policy of allowing amendments to pleadings and the lack of any prejudice to defendant John Shiffer. In ruling on this motion, the court does not address whether any or all of the claims alleged in the first amended complaint (particularly those seeking invalidity of a trust amendment and a will) are cognizable in the civil division or whether they must be made in the probate division. Order signed. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Carol Karen CSR #8189 =302/hk
